description: CompositionNavy blue melange round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline and distressed look graphic with rubber print detailing on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print Don't you just love it when you are always right? In that case, this round neck t-shirt from mr. men is perfect for you. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the slightly distressed look of the Mr. Clever graphic with rubber print detailing will make your friends laugh. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders"
